##  What changed
- Set up a basic PR template to make reviews easier.
- Added a checklist to double-check my work before submitting.

##  Why 
I want to make sure every PR has enough context so the team knows exactly what is going on without guessing.
 It also helps me catch small mistakes (like forgotten prints) before I ping anyone.

## How to test
1. Open a new PR and see if this template loads.
2. Check if the "How to run" section in README works for you.

## Checklist 
- [ ] Only one logical change in this PR.
- [ ] No temporary print statements left.
- [ ] Ran the code and it works.
